_comment: Research config for eval_game.py. Pass with --run-config path/to/eval_config.json
_anomaly: ──── Anomaly gating (0 = always show when flag is True) ────
_anomaly_note_score: score_table shown only when |curr_cp - prev_cp| >= threshold
_anomaly_note_mak: makogonov suppressed during Opening phase automatically
_anomaly_note_pawn: pawn_structure shown only when max(weaknesses_per_side) >= threshold
_anomaly_note_space: space shown only when |white_sq - black_sq| >= threshold
_anomaly_note_mob: mobility shown only when |score_mobility| >= threshold cp
